steps.title: Set the input to zero
steps.content: The $y$-intercept occurs when $x=0$. In context, $x=0$ means $0$ months after the end of April $2015$, so it represents the end of April $2015$.

steps.title: Interpret the intercept
steps.content: The $y$-intercept means the estimated number of scheduled deliveries at the end of April $2015$ was $31$. The answer is B.
